property.name: source_format
property.value: world_map.raw metatile ids; gid = metatile_id + 1; Spawns/Stage Events x/y are visual editor boxes; raw spawn offset comes from object_profiles.json

property.name: note
property.value: actual TMX/world_map layout extent; reference only; not imported to ROM

property.name: note
property.value: decoded from stage init block; $c414 is player_x_max, not camera bound; height uses gameplay viewport $80 because bottom $10 px is HUD/window

property.name: note
property.value: stage1 special camera/start profile selected by c0b4/c0bc; height uses gameplay viewport $80 because bottom $10 px is HUD/window

property.name: note
property.value: stage1 special camera/start profile selected by c0b4/c0bc; height uses gameplay viewport $80 because bottom $10 px is HUD/window

property.name: note
property.value: stage1 special camera/start profile selected by c0b4/c0bc; height uses gameplay viewport $80 because bottom $10 px is HUD/window

property.name: note
property.value: stage1 special camera/start profile selected by c0b4/c0bc; height uses gameplay viewport $80 because bottom $10 px is HUD/window

property.name: note
property.value: decoded from stage init block; $c414 is player_x_max, not camera bound

property.name: note
property.value: stage1 special camera/start profile selected by c0b4/c0bc

property.name: note
property.value: stage1 special camera/start profile selected by c0b4/c0bc

property.name: note
property.value: stage1 special camera/start profile selected by c0b4/c0bc

property.name: note
property.value: stage1 special camera/start profile selected by c0b4/c0bc
